titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-nu'man Al-Razi
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-nu'man Al-Razi

segments: ه عن النعمان الرازيّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسن بن متّيل الدّقّاق، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن سالم، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن النعمان الرّازيّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن النعمان الرازيّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسن بن متّيل الدّقّاق، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن سالم، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن النعمان الرّازيّ‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Nu'man Al-Razi has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Hasan ibn Matil Al-Daqqaq, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Salim, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Al-Nu'man Al-Razi.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Nu'man Al-Razi has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Hasan ibn Matil Al-Daqqaq, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Salim, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Al-Nu'man Al-Razi.
